arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the API Gateway authorizer.

authorizer_credentials.description: The credentials required for the authorizer, such as a role ARN.

authorizer_result_ttl_in_seconds.description: Time-to-live (TTL) in seconds for caching the authorizer results.

authorizer_uri.description: The URI of the authorizer's Lambda function.

id.description: The unique identifier of the API Gateway authorizer.

identity_source.description: The source of the identity, such as headers or query strings.

identity_validation_expression.description: A validation expression for the incoming identity.

name.description: The name of the API Gateway authorizer.

provider_arns.description: A list of provider ARNs for the authorizer.
